results.statement: For any finite set S with n elements, |P(S)| = 2^n
results.lean_code:
theorem a0004 For any finite set S with n elements, |P(S)| = 2^n := by
  -- Count argument or pigeonhole principle
  have h1 : ∀ x, P x := by induction n with
  | zero => simp
  | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  have h2 : ∀ x, Q x := by sorry
  exact ∀ x, R x sorry

theorem b0014 Every prime p > 2 is odd := by
  -- Use properties of divisibility, primes, or modular arithmetic
  have h1 : property 1 := by omega
  have h2 : property 2 := by sorry
  omega sorry

theorem b0017 lim(n->inf) 1/n = 0 := by
  -- Limit, continuity, or convergence argument
  rw [Metric.tendsto_atTop]
  intro ε hε
  use N
  intro n hn
  rw [Real.dist_eq]
  field_simp
  simp
